commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a shared slash-command argument slicer with a token-boundary check and applies it to the shared set/unset parser plus the direct `/models` and `/allowlist` handlers with regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main uses prefix `startsWith` matching in the shared parser and direct handlers, so longer command names can be consumed before this PR. I did not run a live channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the updated PR addresses the prior mechanical blocker and has no blocking review finding.
